parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    LOWER(TRIM('{{ String($json.search_query || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}')) AS q
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.max_results_limit'
      ),
      100
    ) AS max_results_limit
),

query_terms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(term) AS term
  FROM input_data i,
  regexp_split_to_table(i.q, '[\s,;]+') AS term
  WHERE TRIM(term) <> ''
    AND LENGTH(TRIM(term)) >= 2
),

messages_base AS (
  SELECT
    m.id AS message_id,
    m.id AS id,
    m.user_id,
    (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id,

    m.topic_id,
    t.title AS topic_title,

    m.message_uuid,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_id,
    m.file_unique_id,
    m.file_name,
    m.mime_type,
    m.caption,
    m.telegram_file_path,
    m.file_url,
    m.latitude,
    m.longitude,
    m.location_title,
    m.location_address,
    m.maps_url,

    meta.summary AS ai_summary,
    meta.category AS ai_category,
    meta.language AS ai_language,
    meta.keywords AS ai_keywords,
    meta.ai_content AS ai_content,

    LOWER(
      CONCAT_WS(
        ' ',
        m.content,
        m.caption,
        m.file_name,
        m.mime_type,
        m.location_title,
        m.location_address,
        m.maps_url,
        t.title,
        meta.summary,
        meta.category,
        meta.language,
        COALESCE(
          (
            SELECT string_agg(k.keyword, ' ')
            FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(meta.keywords, '[]'::jsonb)) AS k(keyword)
          ),
          ''
        ),
        meta.ai_content
      )
    ) AS searchable_text

  FROM gnote.messages m

  LEFT JOIN gnote.topics t
    ON t.id = m.topic_id
   AND t.user_id = m.user_id

  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT meta.*
    FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
    WHERE meta.user_id = m.user_id
      AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'attached') <> 'deleted'
      AND (
           meta.message_id = m.id
           OR meta.message_uuid = m.message_uuid
      )
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN meta.message_id = m.id THEN 1
        WHEN meta.message_uuid = m.message_uuid THEN 2
        ELSE 9
      END,
      meta.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST,
      meta.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) meta ON TRUE

  WHERE m.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
),

matched AS (
  SELECT
    mb.*,

    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM query_terms qt
      WHERE mb.searchable_text LIKE '%' || qt.term || '%'
    ) AS matched_terms,

    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM query_terms
    ) AS total_terms,

    (
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(mb.file_name, '')) LIKE '%' || (SELECT q FROM input_data) || '%' THEN 5
        ELSE 0
      END
      +
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(mb.caption, '')) LIKE '%' || (SELECT q FROM input_data) || '%' THEN 4
        ELSE 0
      END
      +
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(mb.content, '')) LIKE '%' || (SELECT q FROM input_data) || '%' THEN 4
        ELSE 0
      END
      +
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(mb.topic_title, '')) LIKE '%' || (SELECT q FROM input_data) || '%' THEN 3
        ELSE 0
      END
      +
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(mb.ai_summary, '')) LIKE '%' || (SELECT q FROM input_data) || '%' THEN 3
        ELSE 0
      END
      +
      CASE
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(mb.ai_content, '')) LIKE '%' || (SELECT q FROM input_data) || '%' THEN 2
        ELSE 0
      END
      +
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(
          (
            SELECT string_agg(k.keyword, ' ')
            FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(mb.ai_keywords, '[]'::jsonb)) AS k(keyword)
          ),
          ''
        ) LIKE '%' || (SELECT q FROM input_data) || '%' THEN 3
        ELSE 0
      END
      +
      (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM query_terms qt
        WHERE mb.searchable_text LIKE '%' || qt.term || '%'
      )
    ) AS relevance_score

  FROM messages_base mb
  WHERE
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM query_terms) > 0
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM query_terms qt
      WHERE mb.searchable_text NOT LIKE '%' || qt.term || '%'
    )
),

ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        relevance_score DESC,
        created_at DESC,
        message_id DESC
    ) AS result_number,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_results
  FROM matched
)

SELECT
  chat_id,
  user_id,

  message_id,
  id,
  topic_id,
  topic_title,

  result_number,
  total_results,
  relevance_score,
  (SELECT q FROM input_data) AS search_query,

  message_uuid,
  content,
  created_at,
  message_type,
  file_id,
  file_unique_id,
  file_name,
  mime_type,
  caption,
  telegram_file_path,
  file_url,
  latitude,
  longitude,
  location_title,
  location_address,
  maps_url,

  ai_summary,
  ai_category,
  ai_language,
  ai_keywords,
  ai_content,

  CASE
    WHEN message_type = 'photo' THEN 'photo'
    WHEN message_type IN ('document', 'file', 'audio', 'voice', 'video', 'video_note') THEN 'file'
    WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 'location'
    ELSE 'text'
  END AS result_action,

  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(file_name, ''),
    NULLIF(caption, ''),
    NULLIF(content, ''),
    NULLIF(location_title, ''),
    NULLIF(location_address, ''),
    NULLIF(maps_url, ''),
    NULLIF(ai_summary, ''),
    'Message'
  ) AS display_text

FROM ranked
ORDER BY result_number
LIMIT (SELECT max_results_limit FROM settings);

nodes.name: Return search rows to main workflow

main.node: Return search rows to main workflow
